introSection: Unknown is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was first publicly acknowledged in a press release on November 14, 2024.

An permit for the ride was filed in January 2025.

In November 2025, track for the ride arrived at the park.

On December 16, 2025, it was announced that the ride had been delayed to 2027.

fullText:
Unknown is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA.

The ride was first publicly acknowledged in a press release on November 14, 2024.

An permit for the ride was filed in January 2025.

In November 2025, track for the ride arrived at the park.

On December 16, 2025, it was announced that the ride had been delayed to 2027.
